content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "Built-in ad blocker" and "AI-powered suggestions" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1-3), but the only code is a plain SwiftUI task list (App/ContentView.swift:1-19) with no content-blocker extension, CoreML/ML imports, or prediction logic.
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.1 rejects apps whose metadata promises features the binary doesn't deliver, and reviewers actively test marketing claims like ad blocking and AI. ContentView.swift only appends strings to an in-memory list — there is no Safari content blocker target, no CoreML/NaturalLanguage import, and nothing implementing suggestions; only the "works fully offline" claim is trivially true. Remove or soften the ad-blocker and AI claims, or ship the actual features before submission.
